author: waredjeb
body:
This PR mirrors what has been done for the NGTScouting NanoAOD to offline reconstruction. 
The offline NanoAOD for HGCAL and TICL are configured in RecoHGCal/NanoAOD/python 
This PR also adds the TICLCandidates tracks information at the HGCAL boundary, useful for PF studies.
This PR also simplifies the naming of the TICLCandidateExtra information. 

The new workflow .776 contains HGCAL/TICL information without any Sim objects
The new workflow .777 contains HGCAL/TICL information with all the Sim objects and associations maps

Should be tested with:

Workflows: 34634.773 and 34706.777
title: Add HGCAL/TICL NanoAOD for offline
